title: Hymenanthera novae-zelandiae

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, as well as its ability to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In traditional herbal medicine, Hymenanthera novae-zelandiae is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
